# KRONATRIX AI.SEO for Dentists

> KRONATRIX AI.SEO for Dentists explains how dental practices can make their websites easier for AI systems and humans to crawl, understand, trust, cite and consider.

## Main URL
- https://dentists.kronatrix.co.uk/

## Primary prompt answered
- How do dentists get recommended by AI when people ask for local dental services?

## Main audience
- Private dental practices, implant dentists, Invisalign dentists, cosmetic dentists, emergency dentists, local dental clinics and practice owners who want clearer AI/search visibility foundations.

## Key sections
- Short answer: how dentists get recommended by AI.
- Dental AI Visibility Scorecard.
- KRONATRIX method: Prompt + Entity + Proof + Structure + Speed + Schema + Authority.
- Patient prompt library.
- Treatment clarity checklist.
- Proof-in-public statement.
- Dental AI Visibility Check form.

## Disclaimer
KRONATRIX does not provide dental, medical, clinical, or patient treatment advice. This website explains AI.SEO, website visibility, marketing structure, online trust signals, and conversion clarity for dental practices.
